failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation due to cooling or impurities
failure_modes.mitigation: Regular maintenance and inspection of BPR valve
Install pressure relief valve and monitor pressure continuously

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve function with controlled solid introduction to simulate blockage
Conduct pressure relief valve test under simulated overpressure conditions
